creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
Created attachment 166208
Patch against en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/eresources/chapter.xml and en_US.ISO8859-1/share/xml/mailing-lists.ent

At Glen Barber's request, we now have a new mailing list, freebsd-pkgbase.  Accordingly, information about the list needs to be added to the documentation; patch for that attached.
